<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Wilfried Briand Nanguep Wanda — Ingénieur Génie Civil</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
      --accent: #00e5b0;
      --accent-2: #ff6b6b;
      --accent-glow: rgba(0,229,176,0.18);
      --dark: #060d19;
      --dark-2: #0b1628;
      --dark-3: #111f38;
      --text: #e2eff8;
      --text-muted: #6e92a8;
      --border: rgba(0,229,176,0.15);
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; background: var(--dark); color: var(--text); overflow-x: hidden; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--dark); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--accent); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* VISITOR BADGE */
    #visitor-badge {
      position: fixed; top: 1.4rem; right: 1.8rem; z-index: 200;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem;
      background: rgba(6,13,25,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.5rem 1rem 0.5rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 99px;
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeDown 0.7s ease 1.2s forwards;
    }
    #visitor-badge .vdot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--accent); animation: vpulse 2s ease infinite; }
    #visitor-badge strong { color:var(--accent); font-weight:600; font-size:0.72rem; }
    @keyframes vpulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} 50%{opacity:0.4;transform:scale(0.7)} }

    /* HEADER */
    header {
      position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 100;
      padding: 1.3rem 3rem;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px);
      animation: fadeDown 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards;
      transition: background 0.4s, border-color 0.4s;
    }
    header.scrolled { background: rgba(6,13,25,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .logo { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
    .logo span { color: var(--accent); }
    nav ul { list-style:none; display:flex; gap:2.2rem; }
    nav ul li a {
      font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.3s;
    }
    nav ul li a::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-4px; left:0; width:0; height:1px; background:var(--accent); transition:width 0.3s; }
    nav ul li a:hover, nav ul li a.active { color: var(--accent); }
    nav ul li a:hover::after, nav ul li a.active::after { width:100%; }

    /* HERO */
    #accueil {
      min-height: 100vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      align-items: center; padding: 0 4rem 0 5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    /* Diagonal mesh background */
    #accueil::before {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 70% at 75% 50%, rgba(0,229,176,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 20% 80%, rgba(255,107,107,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
    }
    /* thin grid lines */
    #accueil::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(0,229,176,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,229,176,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 60px 60px;
    }
    .hero-deco-line {
      position:absolute; bottom:0; right:42%; width:1px; height:120px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--accent));
      opacity:0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease 1.6s forwards; z-index:2;
    }
    .hero-index {
      position:absolute; top:2rem; left:5rem;
      font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:300;
      letter-spacing:0.4em; color:var(--text-muted);
      opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease 1.8s forwards; z-index:2;
    }
    .hero-left { position:relative; z-index:2; }
    .hero-tag {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.7rem;
      font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent);
      margin-bottom:1.8rem; opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.5s forwards;
    }
    .hero-tag::before { content:''; width:28px; height:1px; background:var(--accent); }
    .hero-title {
      font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
      font-size: clamp(3.2rem,5.5vw,5.5rem); font-weight:300; line-height:1.04;
      opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.7s forwards; margin-bottom:2rem;
    }
    .hero-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--accent); }
    .hero-sub {
      font-size:0.88rem; line-height:1.85; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; max-width:440px;
      opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.9s forwards; margin-bottom:2.8rem;
    }
    .hero-cta { display:flex; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; opacity:0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 1.1s forwards; }

    /* BUTTONS */
    .btn {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; padding:0.9rem 2.2rem;
      font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
      text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
      transition:all 0.35s;
    }
    .btn-outline {
      border:1px solid var(--accent); color:var(--accent); background:transparent;
    }
    .btn-outline::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:var(--accent); transform:translateX(-101%); transition:transform 0.35s; }
    .btn-outline:hover { color:var(--dark); }
    .btn-outline:hover::before { transform:translateX(0); }
    .btn-outline span { position:relative; z-index:1; }

    .btn-filled {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, #00b8c9 100%);
      color:var(--dark); border:none; font-weight:600;
    }
    .btn-filled:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,229,176,0.25); }
    .btn-filled span { position:relative; z-index:1; }

    /* HERO PHOTO */
    .hero-right {
      position:relative; display:flex;
      align-items:flex-end; height:100vh; overflow:hidden; z-index:2;
    }
    .hero-photo-wrap {
      position:relative; width:100%; height:100%;
      display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:center;
    }
    .hero-photo-img {
      width:92%; max-height:92vh; object-fit:cover; object-position:top;
      display:block; position:relative; z-index:2;
      opacity:0; animation: photoReveal 1.2s ease 0.6s forwards;
      -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, black 18%);
      mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, black 18%);
      transition: filter 0.6s;
    }
    .hero-photo-bar {
      position:absolute; left:0; bottom:0; top:10%; width:2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--accent) 40%, var(--accent) 80%, transparent);
      opacity:0; animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease 1.4s forwards; z-index:3;
    }
    .hero-card {
      position:absolute; z-index:10;
      background:rgba(6,13,25,0.88); backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
      border:1px solid var(--border); padding:0.9rem 1.3rem;
      opacity:0;
    }
    .hero-card-1 { bottom:14%; left:-1.5rem; animation: cardSlide 0.7s ease 1.4s forwards; border-left:3px solid var(--accent); }
    .hero-card-2 { top:22%; right:2%; animation: cardSlide 0.7s ease 1.6s forwards; border-left:3px solid var(--accent-2); }
    .hero-card label { display:block; font-size:0.55rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
    .hero-card-2 label { color:var(--accent-2); }
    .hero-card p { font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:400; color:var(--text); white-space:nowrap; }
    .hero-card p strong { color:var(--accent); font-weight:600; }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .section-header { text-align:center; margin-bottom:4rem; opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px); transition:opacity 0.7s, transform 0.7s; }
    .section-header.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .section-label { font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.35em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.8rem; display:block; }
    .section-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem); font-weight:300; line-height:1.1; }
    .section-title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--accent); }
    .divider { width:36px; height:1px; background:var(--accent); margin:1.4rem auto 0; }

    /* ABOUT */
    #a-propos { background:var(--dark-2); }
    .about-grid { max-width:1000px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr; gap:4rem; align-items:start; }
    .about-meta-item { margin-bottom:2rem; opacity:0; transform:translateX(-20px); transition:opacity 0.6s, transform 0.6s; }
    .about-meta-item.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .about-meta-item label { display:block; font-size:0.58rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.4rem; }
    .about-meta-item p { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; }
    .about-text { opacity:0; transform:translateX(20px); transition:opacity 0.7s 0.2s, transform 0.7s 0.2s; }
    .about-text.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .about-text p { font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.9; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; margin-bottom:1rem; }

    /* PROJECTS */
    .projects-grid { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:1.5px; background:var(--border); }
    .projet-card { background:var(--dark-2); overflow:hidden; opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px); transition:opacity 0.6s, transform 0.6s, background 0.3s; position:relative; }
    .projet-card:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.15s} .projet-card:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.25s}
    .projet-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .projet-card:hover { background:var(--dark-3); }
    .projet-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:3px; height:0; background:var(--accent); transition:height 0.4s; z-index:2; }
    .projet-card:hover::before { height:100%; }
    .card-body { padding:2rem 2.5rem; }
    .card-num { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:300; color:var(--border); line-height:1; margin-bottom:0.8rem; transition:color 0.3s; }
    .projet-card:hover .card-num { color:rgba(0,229,176,0.2); }
    .card-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:400; margin-bottom:0.8rem; }
    .card-text { font-size:0.85rem; line-height:1.75; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; }
    .card-tags { margin-top:1rem; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem; }
    .card-tag { font-size:0.58rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:0.2rem 0.6rem; }

    /* EXPERIENCES */
    #experiences { background:var(--dark-2); }
    .timeline { max-width:760px; margin:0 auto; position:relative; }
    .timeline::before { content:''; position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:1px; background:var(--border); }
    .exp-item { padding-left:2.5rem; margin-bottom:3rem; position:relative; opacity:0; transform:translateX(-20px); transition:opacity 0.6s, transform 0.6s; }
    .exp-item.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .exp-dot { position:absolute; left:-4px; top:6px; width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent-glow); }
    .exp-date { font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
    .exp-company { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted); letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
    .exp-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:400; margin-bottom:0.8rem; }
    .exp-text { font-size:0.85rem; line-height:1.75; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; }
    .exp-text ul { list-style:none; margin-top:0.5rem; }
    .exp-text ul li { padding:0.2rem 0 0.2rem 1rem; position:relative; }
    .exp-text ul li::before { content:'—'; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--accent); }

    /* FORMATION */
    .formation-grid { max-width:760px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; gap:2rem; }
    .formation-item {
      border:1px solid var(--border); padding:2rem; opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px);
      transition:opacity 0.6s, transform 0.6s, border-color 0.3s;
      position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .formation-item::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:0; height:3px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-2)); transition:width 0.5s; }
    .formation-item:hover::before { width:100%; }
    .formation-item.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .formation-item:hover { border-color:var(--accent); }
    .formation-date { font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
    .formation-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:400; margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
    .formation-lieu { font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--text-muted); }

    /* COMPETENCES */
    .skills-wrap { max-width:900px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.7rem; justify-content:center; }
    .skill-tag {
      font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-muted);
      border:1px solid var(--border); padding:0.5rem 1.2rem; opacity:0; transform:scale(0.9);
      transition:opacity 0.4s, transform 0.4s, border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s, background 0.3s; cursor:default;
    }
    .skill-tag.visible { opacity:1; transform:scale(1); }
    .skill-tag:hover { border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--dark); background:var(--accent); }

    /* CONTACT */
    #contact { background:var(--dark-2); }
    .contact-grid { max-width:800px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:4rem; }
    .contact-info { opacity:0; transform:translateX(-20px); transition:opacity 0.6s, transform 0.6s; }
    .contact-info.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .contact-info-item { margin-bottom:2rem; }
    .contact-info-item label { display:block; font-size:0.58rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.4rem; }
    .contact-info-item a, .contact-info-item p { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:300; text-decoration:none; line-height:1.6; }
    .contact-info-item a:hover { color:var(--accent); }
    .contact-form { opacity:0; transform:translateX(20px); transition:opacity 0.6s 0.2s, transform 0.6s 0.2s; }
    .contact-form.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .form-group { margin-bottom:1.8rem; }
    .form-group label { display:block; font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.6rem; }
    .form-group input, .form-group textarea {
      width:100%; background:transparent; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
      color:var(--text); font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:300;
      padding:0.7rem 0; outline:none; transition:border-color 0.3s;
    }
    .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-bottom-color:var(--accent); }
    .form-group textarea { resize:vertical; min-height:100px; }
    .form-btn {
      width:100%; padding:1rem; text-align:center; display:block; border:none; cursor:pointer;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, #00b8c9 100%);
      color:var(--dark); font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:600;
      letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .form-btn:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,229,176,0.25); }

    footer { text-align:center; padding:2.5rem 1rem; border-top:1px solid var(--border); font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; color:var(--text-muted); text-transform:uppercase; }
    footer span { color:var(--accent); }

    @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    @keyframes fadeDown { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    @keyframes fadeIn { to{opacity:1} }
    @keyframes photoReveal { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px) scale(0.98)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)} }
    @keyframes cardSlide { from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-20px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)} }

    @media (max-width:900px) {
      #accueil { grid-template-columns:1fr; text-align:center; padding:8rem 2rem 2rem; min-height:auto; }
      .hero-sub { margin:0 auto 2.5rem; }
      .hero-cta { justify-content:center; }
      .hero-right { height:70vw; }
      .hero-photo-img { width:70%; }
      .hero-card-1 { left:0; }
      #visitor-badge { display:none; }
    }
    @media (max-width:700px) {
      header { padding:1rem 1.2rem; }
      nav ul { gap:1rem; }
      nav ul li a { font-size:0.6rem; }
      section { padding:4rem 1.5rem; }
      .about-grid,.projects-grid,.contact-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    }

    /* PROJECT GALLERIES */
    .card-gallery { margin-top:1.5rem; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:6px; }
    .card-gallery img {
      width:100%; height:140px; object-fit:cover; display:block;
      filter:grayscale(20%) contrast(1.05);
      transition:filter 0.4s, transform 0.4s;
      cursor:zoom-in;
    }
    .card-gallery img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) contrast(1.1); transform:scale(1.02); }
    .card-gallery .img-full { grid-column: 1/-1; height:200px; }

    /* LIGHTBOX */
    #lightbox {
      display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9999;
      background:rgba(6,13,25,0.96); backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
      align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column;
    }
    #lightbox.active { display:flex; }
    #lightbox img { max-width:92vw; max-height:82vh; object-fit:contain; border:1px solid rgba(0,229,176,0.2); }
    #lightbox .lb-close {
      position:fixed; top:1.5rem; right:1.5rem; color:var(--accent); font-size:2rem;
      cursor:pointer; background:none; border:none; line-height:1;
    }
    #lightbox .lb-nav { display:flex; gap:1rem; margin-top:1rem; }
    #lightbox .lb-nav button {
      background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-muted);
      padding:0.5rem 1.5rem; font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:0.68rem;
      letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    #lightbox .lb-nav button:hover { border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); }


    /* RECOMMENDATION SECTION */
    #recommandation { background: var(--dark); }
    .reco-wrapper {
      max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.6fr; gap: 3rem; align-items: start;
    }
    .reco-card {
      border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 2.2rem 2rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      opacity:0; transform:translateX(-20px);
      transition: opacity 0.7s, transform 0.7s, border-color 0.3s;
    }
    .reco-card.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .reco-card::before {
      content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0;
      width:3px; height:100%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), var(--accent-2));
    }
    .reco-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .reco-photo-wrap { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1.2rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
    .reco-avatar {
      width:52px; height:52px; border-radius:50%;
      border:2px solid var(--border);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark-3), var(--dark-2));
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.3rem;
      font-weight:600; color:var(--accent); flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .reco-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:400; }
    .reco-role { font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin-top:0.2rem; }
    .reco-institution { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:0.1rem; }
    .reco-quote {
      font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.05rem; font-style:italic;
      line-height:1.75; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:1.5rem;
      position:relative; padding-left:1.2rem;
    }
    .reco-quote::before {
      content:'"'; position:absolute; left:0; top:-0.3rem;
      font-size:2.5rem; color:var(--accent); opacity:0.5; line-height:1;
    }
    .reco-meta { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
    .reco-meta span {
      font-size:0.58rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase;
      color:var(--accent); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:0.2rem 0.6rem;
    }
    .reco-actions { display:flex; gap:0.8rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .reco-btn {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;
      font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:0.62rem; letter-spacing:0.18em;
      text-transform:uppercase; padding:0.75rem 1.4rem; cursor:pointer;
      text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.3s; border:none;
    }
    .reco-btn-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, #00b8c9 100%);
      color: var(--dark); font-weight:600;
    }
    .reco-btn-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,229,176,0.25); }
    .reco-btn-secondary {
      border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-muted); background:transparent;
      position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .reco-btn-secondary::before {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:var(--accent); transform:translateX(-101%); transition:transform 0.3s;
    }
    .reco-btn-secondary:hover { color:var(--dark); }
    .reco-btn-secondary:hover::before { transform:translateX(0); }
    .reco-btn-secondary span { position:relative; z-index:1; }
    .reco-contact {
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem;
      opacity:0; transform:translateX(20px);
      transition: opacity 0.7s 0.15s, transform 0.7s 0.15s;
    }
    .reco-contact.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0); }
    .reco-contact-item { border:1px solid var(--border); padding:1.2rem 1.5rem; transition:border-color 0.3s; }
    .reco-contact-item:hover { border-color: var(--border); }
    .reco-contact-item label {
      display:block; font-size:0.55rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase;
      color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:0.4rem;
    }
    .reco-contact-item a, .reco-contact-item p {
      font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-muted); text-decoration:none;
      font-weight:300; line-height:1.5;
    }
    .reco-contact-item a:hover { color:var(--accent); }
    .reco-date-badge {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;
      font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
      color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:1.8rem;
    }
    .reco-date-badge::before { content:''; width:20px; height:1px; background:var(--border); }

    /* PDF MODAL */
    #pdf-modal {
      display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9998;
      background:rgba(6,13,25,0.97); backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
      flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    #pdf-modal.active { display:flex; }
    .pdf-modal-header {
      width:min(860px,94vw); display:flex; align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between; padding:0 0 1rem 0;
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom:1rem;
    }
    .pdf-modal-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:300; }
    .pdf-modal-title em { color:var(--accent); font-style:italic; }
    .pdf-modal-close {
      background:none; border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-muted);
      width:36px; height:36px; cursor:pointer; font-size:1rem;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .pdf-modal-close:hover { border-color:var(--accent-2); color:var(--accent-2); }
    .pdf-modal-frame {
      width:min(860px,94vw); height:min(78vh,1000px);
      border:1px solid var(--border); background:white;
    }
    .pdf-modal-footer {
      width:min(860px,94vw); display:flex; justify-content:flex-end;
      padding:0.8rem 0 0 0; gap:0.8rem;
    }

    @media (max-width:700px) {
      .reco-wrapper { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="visitor-badge">
  <span class="vdot"></span>
  <span><strong id="visit-count">—</strong>&nbsp;visites</span>
</div>

<header id="site-header">
  <div class="logo">W<span>.</span>Nanguep</div>
  <nav>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="#accueil">Accueil</a></li>
      <li><a href="#a-propos">À Propos</a></li>
      <li><a href="#projets">Projets</a></li>
      <li><a href="#experiences">Expériences</a></li>
      <li><a href="#formation">Formation</a></li>
      <li><a href="#competences">Compétences</a></li>
      <li><a href="#recommandation">Recommandation</a></li><li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
  </nav>
</header>

<section id="accueil">
  <div class="hero-deco-line"></div>
  <p class="hero-index">01 / 06</p>

  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-tag">Ingénieur Génie Civil · Structures &amp; Chantier</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Wilfried Briand<br><em>Nanguep Wanda</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Étudiant en cycle ingénieur au CESI, 25 ans — alliant expertise terrain en conduite de travaux et maîtrise du calcul de structures. À la recherche d'une alternance à partir de septembre 2026.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="cv-wilfried.pdf" class="btn btn-filled"><span>↓ Télécharger mon CV</span></a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline"><span>Me contacter</span></a>
      <a href="#recommandation" class="btn btn-outline" style="border-color:rgba(0,229,176,0.4);"><span>✦ Recommandation</span></a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
      <div class="hero-photo-bar"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Wilfried Briand Nanguep Wanda" class="hero-photo-img"/>
      <div class="hero-card hero-card-1">
        <label>Disponible dès</label>
        <p><strong>Septembre 2026</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-card hero-card-2">
        <label>Localisation</label>
        <p>Brest, France</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="a-propos">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Profil</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">À <em>Propos</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="about-meta-item"><label>Âge</label><p>25 ans</p></div>
      <div class="about-meta-item"><label>École</label><p>CESI — Cycle Ingénieur</p></div>
      <div class="about-meta-item"><label>Spécialité</label><p>Génie Civil</p></div>
      <div class="about-meta-item"><label>Alternance</label><p>Sept. 2026 → 2029<br>Bureau d'études &amp; Terrain</p></div>
      <div class="about-meta-item"><label>Adresse</label><p>Brest, France</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>Passionné par la conception et la construction, j'allie une expérience terrain solide acquise au Cameroun — conduite de travaux, gestion de chantiers en béton armé — à une maîtrise des outils de calcul de structures modernes.</p>
      <p>Mon parcours atypique, entre l'Afrique et la France, m'a forgé une capacité d'adaptation et une vision globale des projets. Chez SECOBA DELAMRE à Brest, je travaille quotidiennement sur le dimensionnement structurel et la modélisation sur Robot Structural Analysis.</p>
      <p>Je cherche une alternance pour approfondir l'ingénierie des structures, idéalement en bureau d'études ou en maîtrise d'œuvre, avec une ouverture vers le chantier.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="projets">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Réalisations</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Mes <em>Projets</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">01</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Pont en spaghetti — Club Génie Civil CESI, Brest</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Conception et réalisation d'un pont en spaghetti avec les membres du Club Génie Civil au CESI de Brest. Optimisation structurelle, assemblage des éléments et tests de résistance en laboratoire. Année académique 2024–2025.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Résistance des matériaux</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Test en laboratoire</span>
          <span class="card-tag">CESI Brest</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2025</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-gallery">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="img-full" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">02</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Hangar en béton armé — BELG BTP, Douala</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Conduite des travaux d'un hangar industriel en béton armé à Douala en tant que Conducteur de Travaux Junior. Pose de la charpente métallique par grue, suivi qualité et coordination des équipes sur site.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Béton armé</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Charpente métallique</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Conduite de travaux</span>
          <span class="card-tag">BELG BTP</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2024</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-gallery">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">03</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Bâtiments R+2 et R+3 — BELG BTP, Douala</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Suivi de la construction de bâtiments résidentiels en béton armé à Douala. De la fondation jusqu'à la pose de la charpente bois et la finition des façades, contrôle qualité quotidien et coordination des équipes.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Béton armé</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Charpente bois</span>
          <span class="card-tag">BELG BTP</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2023–2024</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-gallery">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="img-full" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">04</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Hangar industriel — SOTECH BTP, Douala</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Ingénieur de suivi sur la construction d'un hangar industriel de grande portée en béton armé à Douala. Contrôle de conformité, mise en place du ferraillage et coordination des sous-traitants.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Béton armé</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Grande portée</span>
          <span class="card-tag">SOTECH BTP</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2022–2024</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-gallery">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">05</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Semelles filantes et radiers — SOTECH BTP, Douala</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Suivi de la réalisation des fondations : ferraillage des semelles filantes, mise en place des cages d'armatures et coffrage. Contrôle de la qualité des travaux de gros œuvre en phase fondation.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Fondations</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Ferraillage</span>
          <span class="card-tag">SOTECH BTP</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2022</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-gallery">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="projet-card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-num">06</div>
        <h3 class="card-title">Hôtel R+9 — Étude structurelle complète</h3>
        <p class="card-text">Projet de fin d'études à l'IUT de Bandjoun : dimensionnement complet d'un hôtel de 9 étages à Yaoundé. Étude structurelle, financière et planification des travaux, de la fondation au dernier niveau.</p>
        <div class="card-tags">
          <span class="card-tag">Béton armé</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Robot Structural</span>
          <span class="card-tag">AutoCAD</span>
          <span class="card-tag">Planning</span>
          <span class="card-tag">2021</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<section id="experiences">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Parcours professionnel</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Mes <em>Expériences</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <p class="exp-date">Mai 2026 – En cours</p>
      <p class="exp-company">SECOBA DELAMRE · Brest, France</p>
      <h3 class="exp-title">Stagiaire — Assistant Ingénieur Structure</h3>
      <div class="exp-text"><ul>
        <li>Dimensionnement de poutres, poteaux et platines de renfort</li>
        <li>Modélisation et analyse des structures sur Robot Structural Analysis</li>
        <li>Études de renforcement des éléments porteurs par structures métalliques</li>
      </ul></div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <p class="exp-date">Mars 2024 – Août 2025</p>
      <p class="exp-company">BELG BTP · Douala, Cameroun</p>
      <h3 class="exp-title">Conducteur de Travaux Junior — CDD</h3>
      <div class="exp-text"><ul>
        <li>Planification et suivi des travaux avec Microsoft Project</li>
        <li>Contrôle de conformité et de qualité des ouvrages exécutés</li>
        <li>Suivi du budget et gestion des coûts avec Microsoft Project et Excel</li>
        <li>Dimensionnement de hangars en béton armé avec Robot, AutoCAD et ArchiCAD</li>
        <li>Sécurité des ouvriers sur chantier et animation des réunions de chantier</li>
      </ul></div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <p class="exp-date">Septembre 2022 – Décembre 2024</p>
      <p class="exp-company">SOTECH BTP · Douala, Cameroun</p>
      <h3 class="exp-title">Ingénieur de Suivi</h3>
      <div class="exp-text"><ul>
        <li>Suivi d'avancement et contrôle qualité d'un chantier de hangar en béton armé</li>
        <li>Vérification de la conformité entre travaux réalisés et plans d'exécution</li>
        <li>Coordination des sous-traitants et suivi des livraisons de matériaux</li>
      </ul></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="formation">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Parcours académique</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Ma <em>Formation</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="formation-grid">
    <div class="formation-item">
      <p class="formation-date">Septembre 2025 – En cours</p>
      <h3 class="formation-title">Cycle Ingénieur — Génie Civil</h3>
      <p class="formation-lieu">Centre d'Études Supérieur Industriel (CESI)</p>
    </div>
    <div class="formation-item">
      <p class="formation-date">2018 – 2021</p>
      <h3 class="formation-title">Licence Technologique — Génie Civil, option Bâtiment</h3>
      <p class="formation-lieu">IUT de Bandjoun, Cameroun · Mention Bien</p>
      <p class="formation-lieu" style="margin-top:0.5rem;font-size:0.82rem;">Projet de fin d'études : étude structurelle, financière et planification d'un hôtel R+9 à Yaoundé.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="competences">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Savoir-faire</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Mes <em>Compétences</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-wrap">
    <div class="skill-tag">Robot Structural Analysis</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">AutoCAD 2D</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">ArchiCAD</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Revit</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">CYPECAD</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Microsoft Project</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Excel</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Matlab</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Béton armé</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Calcul de structures</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Conduite de travaux</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Gestion de chantier</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Français — Natif</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Anglais — B1</div>
    <div class="skill-tag">Allemand / Espagnol — Notions</div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Discutons</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Me <em>Contacter</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="contact-info">
      <div class="contact-info-item"><label>Téléphone</label><p>06 05 51 56 53</p></div>
      <div class="contact-info-item"><label>Email</label><a href="mailto:nanguepwandaw@gmail.com">nanguepwandaw@gmail.com</a></div>
      <div class="contact-info-item"><label>Adresse</label><p>12 Rue de Vendée, Brest, France</p></div>
      <div class="contact-info-item"><label>LinkedIn</label><a href="http://linkedin.com/in/wilfried-briand-nanguep-wanda-273571265" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/wilfried-briand-nanguep-wanda</a></div>
      <div class="contact-info-item"><label>Alternance recherchée</label><p>Septembre 2026 → 2029<br>Bureau d'études &amp; Terrain</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-form">
      <div class="form-group"><label for="nom">Nom</label><input type="text" id="nom" placeholder="Votre nom complet"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label for="email">Email</label><input type="email" id="email" placeholder="votre@email.com"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label for="message">Message</label><textarea id="message" placeholder="Votre message..."></textarea></div>
      <button class="form-btn">Envoyer le message</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="recommandation">
  <div class="section-header">
    <span class="section-label">Témoignage</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Lettre de <em>Recommandation</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="reco-wrapper">

    <div class="reco-card">
      <div class="reco-date-badge">Guipavas · 19 mai 2026</div>
      <div class="reco-photo-wrap">
        <div class="reco-avatar">FM</div>
        <div>
          <p class="reco-name">Frédéric Menan</p>
          <p class="reco-role">Enseignant Responsable Pédagogique</p>
          <p class="reco-institution">CESI École d'Ingénieurs — Brest</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="reco-quote">
        Wilfried a impulsé la création du projet de ponts en spaghettis et a gagné le concours que nous avons organisé début mars. Il a montré un comportement exemplaire toute l'année, une participation en classe, une écoute active et un respect des engagements.
      </p>
      <div class="reco-meta">
        <span>Ingénieur ISAE-ENSMA</span>
        <span>Docteur · Univ. de Poitiers</span>
        <span>Génie Civil</span>
      </div>
      <div class="reco-actions">
        <button class="reco-btn reco-btn-primary" onclick="openPdfModal()">
          ↗ Lire la lettre
        </button>
        <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Lettre_Recommandation_Wilfried_Nanguep.pdf" class="reco-btn reco-btn-secondary">
          <span>↓ Télécharger</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="reco-contact">
      <div class="reco-contact-item">
        <label>Téléphone direct</label>
        <a href="tel:+33787128737">07 87 12 87 37</a>
      </div>
      <div class="reco-contact-item">
        <label>Email professionnel</label>
        <a href="mailto:fmenan@cesi.fr">fmenan@cesi.fr</a>
      </div>
      <div class="reco-contact-item">
        <label>Adresse</label>
        <p>505 rue de Kerlaurent<br>29490 Guipavas, France</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reco-contact-item">
        <label>Établissement</label>
        <p>CESI École d'Ingénieurs<br>Campus de Brest</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reco-contact-item">
        <label>Objet de la recommandation</label>
        <p>Alternance cycle ingénieur BTP<br>à partir de septembre 2026</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- PDF MODAL -->
<div id="pdf-modal">
  <div class="pdf-modal-header">
    <p class="pdf-modal-title">Lettre de recommandation — <em>Frédéric Menan, CESI Brest</em></p>
    <button class="pdf-modal-close" onclick="closePdfModal()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <iframe class="pdf-modal-frame"
    src="data:application/pdf;base64,"
    title="Lettre de recommandation Wilfried Nanguep">
  </iframe>
  <div class="pdf-modal-footer">
    <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Lettre_Recommandation_Wilfried_Nanguep.pdf" class="reco-btn reco-btn-primary" style="text-decoration:none;">↓ Télécharger</a>
    <button class="reco-btn reco-btn-secondary" onclick="closePdfModal()"><span>Fermer</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p>&copy; 2026 — <span>Wilfried Briand Nanguep Wanda</span> · Ingénieur Génie Civil</p>
</footer>

<script>
  (async () => {
    try {
      const r = await fetch('https://api.countapi.xyz/hit/wilfried-nanguep-portfolio/visits');
      const d = await r.json();
      document.getElementById('visit-count').textContent = d.value.toLocaleString('fr-FR');
    } catch(e) { document.getElementById('visit-count').textContent = '—'; }
  })();

  const header = document.getElementById('site-header');
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('nav a');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    header.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
    let current = '';
    sections.forEach(s => { if (window.scrollY >= s.offsetTop - 140) current = s.id; });
    navLinks.forEach(a => { a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + current); });
  });

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      const el = entry.target;
      const siblings = [...el.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.skill-tag, .about-meta-item')];
      const idx = siblings.indexOf(el);
      el.style.transitionDelay = idx >= 0 ? idx * 0.08 + 's' : '';
      el.classList.add('visible');
      observer.unobserve(el);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });

  document.querySelectorAll(
    '.section-header, .projet-card, .exp-item, .skill-tag, .about-meta-item, .about-text, .formation-item, .contact-info, .contact-form, .reco-card, .reco-contact'
  ).forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

<div id="lightbox">
  <button class="lb-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
  <img id="lb-img" src="" alt="Photo chantier" />
  <div class="lb-nav"><button onclick="closeLightbox()">Fermer</button></div>
</div>
<script>
  function openLightbox(src) {
    document.getElementById('lb-img').src = src;
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeLightbox() {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
  document.getElementById('lightbox').addEventListener('click', function(e){
    if(e.target === this) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeLightbox(); });
</script>


<script>
  function openPdfModal() {
    document.getElementById('pdf-modal').classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closePdfModal() {
    document.getElementById('pdf-modal').classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
  document.getElementById('pdf-modal').addEventListener('click', function(e){
    if(e.target === this) closePdfModal();
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
